title: Kitchen Knife Set, 6 Piece Knife Set with Block, Stainless Steel Kitchen Knives for Chopping Chef, Utility,Bread, Filleting & Paring Tools.
features: [Kitchen Knife Set]: This set includes 6 knives and a knife block; the knives include: a paring knife, a multi-purpose knife, a chef's knife, a bread knife, and kitchen scissors.
[Sharp Blades]: The knives are crafted from high-quality stainless steel, featuring sharp blades for safer and more efficient use. They easily cut through a variety of ingredients.
[Comfortable Design]: This knife set is lightweight and well-balanced, preventing fatigue even during extended preparation sessions. The ergonomic design provides a comfortable grip.

[Durable]: The non-stick coating helps prevent food from sticking to the blades, making cutting faster and easier. The ergonomic handles offer a safe and comfortable grip; the included knife block protects the blades and allows for safe storage in a drawer.

[100% Customer Satisfaction Guarantee]: Our knife sets are the perfect companion for your kitchen cooking. If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us. We will resolve your issues as soon as possible.
